name: 몬지 내추럴 슈퍼프리미엄 모노프로틴 어덜트 -토끼- 1.5kg/10kg
몬지 내추럴 슈퍼프리미엄 모노프로틴 키튼 송어 1.5kg/10kg
ingredients: SKŁAD: suszony pstrąg (30%), ryż, tłuszcz zwierzęcy (olej z kurczaka oczyszczony 99,5%), kukurydza, gluten kukurydziany, białko ziemniaczane, ziemniaki, susz buraczany pulpa, hydrolizowane białka zwierzęce (wątroba), minerały, olej rybi (olej z łososia), drożdże piwne, błonnik grochowy, ksylooligosacharydy (XOS 0,3%), juka schidigera (0,1%), produkty przetwórstwa ziół (dzika róża 0,1%).

name: 몬지 내추럴 슈퍼프리미엄 모노프로틴 스테럴라이즈드 오리 1.5kg /10kg
ingredients: COMPOSITION: Duck (26% dehydrated meat, 10% fresh meat), corn gluten, wheat, corn, hydrolysed animal proteins (liver 4%), animal fat (duck oil purified to 99.5%), pea fibre, minerals, yeasts products (manno-oligo-saccharides MOS 1%), Xylo-oligosaccharide (XOS 0.3%), products from the processing of herbs (rose hip 0.1%), Yucca schidigera (0.1%).
nutrition_analysis: 단백질 35%, 지방 12%, 조섬유 3.5%, 조회분 7.0%, ME 3760 kcal/kg

ingredients: COMPOSITION: Hydrolysed salmon protein (16%), tapioca, potatoes, animal fat (tallow) , dried chicken meat, dried carrot, animal fat (chicken oil) , pea fibre, dried fish (anchovies), fish oil (salmon oil)*, inactive brewer’s yeast, xylo-oligosaccharides (XOS 0.4%), minerals, aloe vera (0.06%), products and by-products derived from the processing of fresh fruits and vegetables (melon juice concentrate – Cucumis melo cantalupensis – source of superoxide dismutase 0.005%), milk protein powder. *Refined to 99.6%, preserved with natural antioxidants.

name: 몬지 벳솔루션 다이아베틱 로우펫 1.5kg
ingredients: COMPOSITION: Dried chicken meat (30%), tapioca (20%), hydrolysed salmon protein, dried peas, pea fibre, dried duck meat (7%), inactive brewer’s yeast, animal fat (chicken oil) , fish oil (salmon oil) , potato protein, xylo-oligosaccharides (XOS 0.4%), minerals, psyllium husks (0.5%), Yucca schidigera , products and by-products derived from the processing of fresh fruits and vegetables (melon juice concentrate – Cucumis melo cantalupensis – source of superoxide dismutase 0.005%), milk protein powder. *Refined to 99.6%, preserved with natural antioxidants. **Sources of carbohydrates.

name: 몬지 벳솔루션 가스트로 인테스티널 1.5kg

name: 몬지 벳솔루션 헤파틱 1.5kg
ingredients: COMPOSITION: Dried peas (22%), tapioca, dried chicken meat (15%), animal fat (duck oil) , hydrolysed salmon protein (7%)**, potatoes, animal fat (chicken oil) , fish oil (salmon oil)*, pea fibre, inactive brewer’s yeast, minerals, xylo-oligosaccharides (XOS 0.4%), Yucca schidigera , milk thistle seeds (0.03%), products and by-products derived from the processing of fresh fruits and vegetables (melon juice concentrate – Cucumis melo cantalupensis – source of superoxide dismutase 0.005%), milk protein powder. *Refined to 99.6%, preserved with natural antioxidants. **Sources of protein.
